docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,709.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED RECEIPT SENT TO DEFENDANT $6.00 FILING FEE PAID.
CERT MAIL DOMINADOR CORPUS RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,336.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,150.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $29.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $45.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
CORRESPONDENCE (COPY) FROM H. VILLAREAL, AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES FILED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,236.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $13.50 ACCRUED INTEREST, $72.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $218.50 AS TO DEFENDANT CORPUS DOMINADOR
